headline: Q4 Earnings Highlights: PTC (NASDAQ:PTC) Vs The Rest Of The Design Software Stocks
summary: Looking back on design software stocks’ Q4 earnings, we examine this quarter’s best and worst performers, including PTC (NASDAQ:PTC) and its peers.

headline: Shares of companies in the broader software sector are trading lower amid a pullback in sentiment after Q1 financial results and outlook comments from industry peers IBM and ServiceNow.

summary: PTC, listed as NasdaqGS:PTC, is showcasing a collaboration with Bobcat at Hannover Messe 2026. The event highlights cloud native and AI powered tools in a real industrial setting with a high profile equipment maker.
